examples.title: GameplayLoop Module
examples.description: The core server-side round manager. Handles state transitions, player assignment, and win/loss conditions using a clean OOP pattern with my standard _G.Utility convention.
examples.code:
-- >> GameplayLoop Module
-- Core round management system for Wrong Floor
-- Uses standard Init(mod) pattern with _G.Utility

local GameplayLoop = {}

-- >> Services
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

-- >> Constants
local ROUND_DURATION = 120 --// seconds per round
local INTERMISSION = 15   --// seconds between rounds

-- >> State
local currentState = "Waiting"
local roundTimer = 0
local activePlayers = {}

-- >> Init
function GameplayLoop.Init(mod)
	_G.Utility.DebugPrint("GameplayLoop initialized")

	--// Wire up remote events
	mod.Network:BindEvent("RequestState", function(player)
		mod.Network:FireClient(player, "StateUpdate", currentState, roundTimer)
	end)

	--// Begin loop
	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
		GameplayLoop._Tick(dt, mod)
	end)
end

-- >> Internal
function GameplayLoop._Tick(dt, mod)
	if currentState == "InRound" then
		roundTimer -= dt
		if roundTimer <= 0 then
			GameplayLoop._EndRound(mod)
		end
	end
end

function GameplayLoop._EndRound(mod)
	_G.Utility.DebugPrint("Round ended — transitioning to intermission")
	currentState = "Intermission"
	roundTimer = INTERMISSION
	mod.Network:FireAllClients("StateUpdate", currentState, roundTimer)
end

return GameplayLoop

examples.title: Silhouette Renderer
examples.description: The visual system that gives Wrong Floor its distinct look. Clones character parts, fills them black, and adds white outline clones using a negative scale trick. Handles z-ordering via render priority.
examples.code:
-- >> SilhouetteRenderer Module
-- Applies black-fill + white-outline silhouette effect to characters
-- Called client-side per character addition

local SilhouetteRenderer = {}

-- >> Constants
local BODY_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)       --// black fill
local OUTLINE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255) --// white outline
local OUTLINE_SCALE = 1.04                        --// slightly larger clone

-- >> Init
function SilhouetteRenderer.Init(mod)
	_G.Utility.DebugPrint("SilhouetteRenderer ready")
end

-- >> Apply silhouette to a character model
function SilhouetteRenderer.Apply(character)
	for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then

			--// Black body fill
			part.Color = BODY_COLOR
			part.Material = Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
			part.CastShadow = false

			--// White outline clone
			local outline = part:Clone()
			outline.Color = OUTLINE_COLOR
			outline.Size = part.Size * OUTLINE_SCALE
			outline.CFrame = part.CFrame
			outline.CanCollide = false
			outline.CastShadow = false

			--// Parent under part so it follows it
			local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
			weld.Part0 = part
			weld.Part1 = outline
			weld.Parent = outline
			outline.Parent = part
		end
	end
end

return SilhouetteRenderer
